name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate weekly cash flow forecasts instead of manual tracking of invoices and cash flow.
problem_solved: Inconsistent cash flow due to delayed payments from clients.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent cash flow due to delayed payments from clients.
